General.Name: Beijing Beida Jade Bird Universal Sci-Tech Co Ltd
General.Description: Beijing Beida Jade Bird Universal Sci-Tech Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the trading of metallic products and tourism development in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and the United States. It operates through four segments: Tourism Development, Investment Holding, Trading of Metallic Products, Sales and Production of LED Devices, and All Other segments. The company offers environmental shuttle bus, entertainment performance, and property management services; and operates tourist facilities, and tourist service center and souvenir shops. It also purchases and sells metallic products; and produces and sells wine and related products. In addition, the company involved in the provision of investment management and advisory services; and development, manufacture, and sale of high-end ceramic high-power LED devices and modules, as well as research, development, and manufacturing of special light sources. Further, the company engages in the travel and leisure, fund holding, and debt and equity investment, as well as management businesses. Beijing Beida Jade Bird Universal Sci-Tech Company Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
General.Address: Beida Jade Bird Building, Beijing, China, 100871
